name: @formkit/auto-animate
when_to_use: 需要在列表/网格/DOM 内容发生增删改序时自动平滑过渡(筛选、排序、增删项、展开折叠)时用它:autoAnimate(parentEl) 一句,之后你对该父容器直接子节点的任何 add/remove/move 都会动。它 augment 你的 DOM(不吃数据、不做拖拽);要拖拽重排本身用 formkit-drag-and-drop。widget 内传 shadow 里的真实父容器即可。
why_valuable: 正确的 FLIP 布局动画(增删改序前后测量→反演→播放)是出了名的难,AI 几乎总做成生硬跳变;auto-animate 用 WAAPI + 一次性全局测量(scroll/ResizeObserver)把这套 FLIP 封成单函数,零 CSS 注入且尊重 prefers-reduced-motion。

en.when_to_use: Use it when additions, removals, or reordering in a list, grid, or DOM content should transition smoothly automatically, including filtering, sorting, item changes, and expand/collapse. Call autoAnimate(parentEl) once and subsequent add/remove/move operations on that parent's direct children animate. It augments your DOM; it does not consume data or provide dragging. For drag reordering itself, use formkit-drag-and-drop. In a widget, pass the real parent container inside the shadow.
en.why_valuable: Correct FLIP layout animation, measuring before and after a change, inverting, then playing, is notoriously difficult; AI almost always produces abrupt jumps. auto-animate packages FLIP into one function using WAAPI plus one-time global measurement through scroll/ResizeObserver, injects no CSS, and respects prefers-reduced-motion.

data_in.note: auto-animate consumes no data; it takes a parent container plus optional options. The animated objects are direct children subsequently added, removed, or moved in that container. Use the framework-agnostic core default export, not the /react or /vue subpaths.

schema.container: HTMLElement - parent whose direct-child additions, removals, and moves should animate automatically (pass the real element)

options?.duration?: number - duration of each animation in ms, default 250
options?.disrespectUserMotionPreference?: boolean - default false (respects prefers-reduced-motion; setting true is not recommended)

spec.note: No independent visual surface; height is determined by the parent container's content. Do not use vh or percentage heights.

data_in.note: auto-animate 不吃数据、吃一个父容器 + 可选 options;动画对象是你后续对该容器直接子节点做的 add/remove/move。用框架无关的 core default 导出(非 /react、/vue 子路径)。

schema.container: HTMLElement —— 要自动动画其直接子元素增删移的父容器(传真实元素)

options?.duration?: number —— 单次动画时长 ms,默认 250
options?.disrespectUserMotionPreference?: boolean —— 默认 false(尊重 prefers-reduced-motion;不建议改 true)

spec.note: 无独立视觉;高度由父容器内容撑开,禁 vh/百分比高。

example._why: 钉死它作用于容器 + 后续子节点变动;options 里 easing 枚举是真实字段。

uplink: 无上行;返回的 AnimationController(enable/disable/isEnabled)由消费 AI 直接接。

carriers.widget: supported:WAAPI 无 CSS 注入,作用于 shadow 内父容器;模块级 window scroll/ResizeObserver 全局但不破坏隔离

isolation.evidence: +esm 导出 default autoAnimate(I) === named autoAnimate,另有 {getTransitionSizes, vAutoAnimate}。index.d.ts:autoAnimate(el:HTMLElement, config?: Partial<AutoAnimateOptions>|plugin) => AnimationController{parent, enable, disable, isEnabled};AutoAnimateOptions={duration, easing='ease-in-out', disrespectUserMotionPreference?}。+esm 隔离扫描:document.head=0、createElement('style')=0、insertRule=0 —— 动画走 WAAPI(el.animate/finish 监听)。全局(模块初始化、各一次):`window.addEventListener('scroll',...)`、`new ResizeObserver(...)`、`window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)')`;document.body 仅作为祖先回溯兜底 `r||(r=document.body)`(读、不改)。这些全局用于坐标/FLIP 测量,不越界也不破坏 shadow —— autoAnimate 对 shadow 内父容器正常工作。
